financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Poor
bullets: The bank's profits were lower because of a one-time event involving the sale of shares.
Despite some positive future plans, the bank's earnings from investments have dropped significantly.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling risks well, but unexpected events like a big share sale can make earnings unpredictable.
New rules are coming that could change how the company operates, adding some uncertainty to its future plans.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing okay in taking care of the environment but has room to improve.
They are average in treating people well and managing their business responsibly.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke with confidence about their strong financial results and future plans.
They successfully addressed questions and concerns, showing they are well-prepared and optimistic about the future.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company sometimes gave clear answers but often used general statements without much detail.
Some questions were answered directly, but others were only partially addressed, making it hard to fully understand their plans.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The bank's leaders are very confident about the future and have plans that show they are doing well.
Even though there are some worries about deposits, the bank is making smart moves to grow and succeed.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: SBI is doing well because it has a strong brand and many branches, helping it grow and keep its finances stable.
The bank is also improving its digital services and recently raised money, which makes it stronger for future growth.
